items.title: Show HN: Slate – Open-source AI workspace with a built-in browser
items.why_it_matters: Hi HN, I've been building Slate for the past few months and just open-sourced it. It's a native macOS app that puts AI chat and web browsing in the same window. The idea came from how I actually use AI day to day. I'd ask Claude or GPT something, get a bunch of li…

items.title: Public figures on AI, it’s a real mix
items.why_it_matters: It’s curious to see some of the quite varied views on AI. The usual suspects you’d expect, but was quite surprised on the level of nuance in views between say Mamdani to say Newsom.
